text:
Model files

 SAS Name
 Variable Name

 BENE_ID 
 Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID 

 PRACTICE_ID 
 Model-Assigned Practice ID 

 PRACTICE_NAME 
 Name of Practice 

 TIN 
 Practice's Taxpayer Identification Number 

 UNIQUE_PATIENT_ID 
 Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID 

 PATIENT_DOB 
 Patient's Date of Birth 

 PATIENT_SEX 
 Patient's Sex 

 PATIENT_RACE 
 Patient's Race 

 PATIENT_ETHNICITY 
 Patient's Ethnicity 

 IS_MEDICARE_PARTB 
 Identify if the Patient is Enrolled in Medicare Part B
